name: Sandra Gambrel Garage Plan - 24x30 Barn-Style Garage with Loft Potential | Large DIY Workshop & Storage Building Plans
open_features: Classic barn-style architecture with a high-capacity roof profile that dramatically increases vertical interior space and storage potential.
The 24x30 footprint provides plenty of room for multiple vehicles, ATVs, lawn equipment, tool storage, and dedicated workshop areas.
The gambrel roof naturally creates overhead space ideal for a full storage loft, seasonal storage, or an elevated workshop mezzanine.
Efficient framing techniques and logical dimensions make Sandra a practical project for experienced DIY builders or contractors.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Sandra Gambrel Garage - a spacious 24x30 barn-style garage and workshop building designed for efficiency, durability, and timeless architectural appeal. Featuring the iconic gambrel roof profile, Sandra maximizes interior headroom while delivering the classic charm of a traditional barn-inspired structure. With its generous footprint, loft-ready design, and DIY-friendly construction, this garage combines serious functionality with standout curb ap...
